v2.ams.get_shop_performance.define: Retrieve overall key metrics for all channels or specific channels.

v2.payment.get_escrow_detail.define: Use this API to fetch the accounting detail of order.

v2.payment.get_escrow_list.define: Use this API to fetch the accounting list of order.

v2.payment.get_wallet_transaction_list.define: Use this API to get the transaction records of wallet. Only applicable for local shops.

v2.payment.get_escrow_detail_batch.define: Use this API to fetch the details of order income by batch.

v2.payment.get_income_detail.define: Retrieves detailed order-level income information across various income statuses for a specified time period.

v2.payment.get_income_overview.define: Retrieves a consolidated snapshot of the seller income amounts categorized by income status.

v2.payment.get_payout_detail.define: This API is applicable for Cross Border (CB) sellers only to get the shop payout data.

v2.order.get_order_detail.define: Use this api to get order detail.
